Overview/Docs

Documentation

Architecture docs, schema references, and integration guides.

Architecture

Overview

System context, data model, services, and pipeline stages

Read →

Provider Policy

Provider routing doctrine and model shortlist

Read →

fal Integration Strategy

Planned

QA / Evals

Automated quality checks and evaluation framework

View on GitHub →

Schemas

JSON Schema definitions for the pipeline data model.

CreativeBrief

Intake: brand, audience, platform targets, creative direction

creative_brief.schema.json
AssetJob

Individual generation/edit job with provider routing and status

asset_job.schema.json
BrandPreset

Brand rules: fonts, colors, watermarks, title safe areas

brand_preset.schema.json
ExportProfile

Platform format specs: aspect ratio, duration, codec, metadata

export_profile.schema.json
PublishPlan

Scheduling and delivery targets per platform

publish_plan.schema.json
PerformanceReport

Post-publish analytics: retention, CTR, hook performance

performance_report.schema.json

Getting Started

# Clone the repo
git clone https://github.com/Insightpulseai/ugc-mediaops-kit.git
cd ugc-mediaops-kit

# Explore the architecture
cat docs/architecture/OVERVIEW.md

# Review provider policy
cat docs/architecture/PROVIDER_POLICY.md

# Check fal integration strategy
cat docs/architecture/FAL_INTEGRATION_STRATEGY.md

Contributing

ugc-mediaops-kit is early and open. We welcome contributions in schemas, provider adapters, pipeline modules, QA checks, example workflows, and documentation.

Open an issueView the repo
Mugc-mediaops-kit

Open-source finishing pipeline for agency UGC and generative media workflows.
